description: Companion artifact to career_model.pkl. Stores the ordered class label list that matches pipeline.classes_ so downstream code can resolve predicted indices to human-readable names without re-loading the full pipeline.

history.note: baseline — 5-class registry; marketing added via gold-label merge

usage.load:
import pickle
with open('career_classes.pkl','rb') as f:
    classes = pickle.load(f)
label = classes[predicted_index]

notes: Always load this file alongside career_model.pkl to guarantee index alignment
Re-generate this file whenever career_model.pkl is retrained — class order may shift if new labels are added
